org_constraint: Incorporating at least three of the following keywords: "strategy," "collaboration," "milestones," "performance," and "growth."
new_constraint: Avoid using any of the following words: "strategy," "collaboration," "milestones," "performance," and "growth."

    *   These instructions are mutually exclusive. I cannot fulfill both simultaneously.

The Model Response does not provide a clear plan or output but instead contains a lengthy thought process analyzing the conflicting constraints. It does not explicitly use any of the forbidden words ("strategy," "collaboration," "milestones," "performance," "growth") in the output text.
